name: Rosemary Focaccia Bites
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Unroll pizza dough on a baking sheet to form an 8 x 12 rectangle.
3. In a small bowl, combine oil, rosemary, salt, zest, and pepper.
4. Brush the dough with the oil mixture, leaving a 1/4-inch border around the edges.
5. Sprinkle the dough with roasted red peppers, scallions, and olives.
6. Bake until golden brown, about 10-12 minutes.
7. Cut into squares.
